sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_idna (input String, encoded String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY input;
INSERT INTO test_idna (input, encoded) VALUES ('example.com', tryIdnaEncode('example.com'));
UPDATE test_idna SET encoded = tryIdnaEncode(input) WHERE input LIKE '%.com';
SELECT input, encoded FROM test_idna WHERE encoded = '';
SELECT input, tryIdnaEncode(input) AS encoded FROM test_idna;
